title: Auto-deploy cih-api / cih-worker on push to main
description: Today main pushes are not deployed automatically — someone has to run 'gcloud builds submit' + 'gcloud run deploy' by hand. This is how the auth.py NameError sat undeployed for ~3 hours after PR #10 merged. Add a GitHub Action (or Cloud Build trigger) that on push to main rebuilds both images with both ':live' and ':<sha>' tags and rolls out cih-api-prod + cih-worker-prod.

title: Multi-tenancy / workspace isolation in Postgres + GCS
description: Per-tenant schema or row-level isolation in Postgres; per-tenant prefix or bucket in GCS; auth scopes a session to one tenant. Required before more than one client shares infra.

title: Anthropic integration status was hard-coded to Pending regardless of CIH_CLOUD_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
description: shared/db.py ensure_default_integrations seeded the integration_states row for Anthropic with connected=False and status_message='Pending configuration' regardless of whether the env actually has CIH_CLOUD_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Repurpose works, so the badge was misleading. Fix derives connected and status from settings.anthropic_api_key. Built and deploying as part of this session; will land via PR #13 follow-up commit.

title: Rotate weak CIH_CLOUD_MAGIC_LINK_SECRET / CIH_CLOUD_SESSION_SECRET on cih-api-prod
description: Current values 'prod-magic-secret' / 'prod-session-secret' pass the production guardrail (which only rejects the literal dev defaults) but are still weak/predictable. Generate strong random values, store in Secret Manager (CIH_CLOUD_MAGIC_LINK_SECRET / CIH_CLOUD_SESSION_SECRET), then 'gcloud run services update cih-api-prod --update-secrets=...:latest'. Note: rotating session_secret invalidates all existing sessions.

title: Local: wire watched folders + background watcher at startup
close_reason: Hydrate watched_folders on startup; ContentWatcher recursive; PUT settings restarts watcher

title: Worker missing CIH_CLOUD_WORKER_URL silently 500s every Cloud Tasks call
description: cih-worker-prod was missing CIH_CLOUD_WORKER_URL when first deployed; shared/worker_oidc.py raises HTTPException(500, 'Worker OIDC not configured') before the job runs. FastAPI does not log a traceback for HTTPException, so symptom is endless silent 500s with no clue why. Two follow-ups: (1) make worker_oidc give a louder log line at startup if audience is missing, (2) add the env var to the Terraform/runbook so a fresh deploy is correctly configured. Now set on cih-worker-prod (rev 00011) along with CIH_CLOUD_ENVIRONMENT=production and CIH_CLOUD_TASKS_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_EMAIL.

title: Partnership-readiness: make CIH sellable as a fixed-price engagement
description: Close gaps that block a non-author from selling, scoping, and installing CIH for a paying client. Each child closes one sales-blocker; epic is done when partner can quote, demo, and install without product owner on the call.

title: Install kit: one-command setup + templated terraform.tfvars + 10-page runbook
description: Partner runs ./install.sh CLIENT_NAME and stands up a branded prod stack in under 60min. Templated tfvars (project_id, region, domain, branding). Runbook covers GCP project creation, IAM, DNS for Resend, magic-link domain, smoke test.

title: Branding-via-config: no per-client forks
description: App name, logo, primary color, allowed email domains, magic-link from-address all driven by config (env or per-deploy JSON), not code edits. Every client install is the same git ref.

title: Auth hardening for buyer security review
description: Rotate CIH_CLOUD_MAGIC_LINK_SECRET + CIH_CLOUD_SESSION_SECRET to Secret Manager-backed strong values; lock CIH_CLOUD_ALLOWED_EMAIL_DOMAINS to per-tenant allowlist; tighten CIH_CLOUD_CORS_ALLOW_ORIGINS to client domain. Subsumes follow-up bead 27a from PR #12.

title: GCP: finish prod apply — Artifact Registry images, Cloud Run cih-api/cih-worker, Tasks queue
description: Partial Terraform apply: SQL+bucket+secrets+Resend IAM succeeded. Fix 409 queue (import google_cloud_tasks_queue.jobs[0] OR manage_cloud_tasks_queue=false). Build/push us-docker.pkg.dev/PROJECT/cih/cih-api:latest and cih-worker:latest (see infra/gcp/README.md). Delete broken Run revisions if needed. Apply again.
close_reason: Refactored: dropped Cloud Run from Terraform; deleted broken cih-api/cih-worker shells; imported cih-job-queue; terraform plan clean. PR #12.

title: Tighten CIH_CLOUD_ALLOWED_EMAIL_DOMAINS on cih-api-prod
description: Currently '*' on cih-api-prod, which means anyone who learns the public Cloud Run URL can self-onboard a workspace. Set to the operator domains (e.g. riskandresponse.com,agenticstudiolabs.com) before sharing the URL: 'gcloud run services update cih-api-prod --update-env-vars=CIH_CLOUD_ALLOWED_EMAIL_DOMAINS=riskandresponse.com,agenticstudiolabs.com'.

title: Cloud: send magic links via transactional email (SES/SendGrid/Postmark)
close_reason: Resend integration: CIH_CLOUD_RESEND_API_KEY, HTML email, optional app base URL, delivery status

title: Partner-facing docs: scoping cheat sheet + SLA tiers + support boundaries
description: Two-page scoping doc: what is in scope for tier A/B/C, what counts as a connector vs custom integration, fixed-price ranges. SLA doc: P1/P2/P3 response times, what is billable, escalation path to product owner. Last because it describes what already exists.

title: Cover cloud FastAPI route imports in tests (catch NameError at startup)
description: PR #10 (3dbb53d) introduced cloud/api/routes/auth.py references to logging / send_magic_link_email / cloud_settings without imports. CI passed because cloud/tests/* never imports the FastAPI route modules. Add a smoke test that does 'from api.app import app' (or imports each routes/* module) so any future missing-import regression is caught before deploy.

title: Always-on demo environment with seeded content
description: Public demo URL partner can open on a discovery call. Around 50 sample docs loaded, sample agents configured, magic-link disabled (one-click guest login). Reset nightly via Cloud Scheduler.

title: Electron main should auto-load .env so CIH_USE_LOCAL_SIDECAR works as documented
description: CLAUDE.md and .env.example tell users to set CIH_USE_LOCAL_SIDECAR=false in .env to skip the local Python sidecar. But electron/sidecar.ts reads process.env.CIH_USE_LOCAL_SIDECAR at runtime, and Electron's main process does not auto-load .env (only Vite's renderer does). Result: the sidecar spawn always fires, and on machines without sidecar/.venv (e.g. fresh worktrees) the dev server logs an ENOENT error before continuing. Fix: require('dotenv').config() at the top of electron/main.ts before importing sidecar.ts (or use Vite's loadEnv equivalent in main).
close_reason: Superseded by PR #13 — electron/main.ts now reads .env at startup, so CIH_USE_LOCAL_SIDECAR=false works as documented.

title: Detail page should show live job status + auto-refresh when Repurpose completes
description: When the user clicks Generate on a Content Detail page, the button shows 'Queueing...' but there is no visible feedback when the job actually completes. Generated content appears in the section below the body but only on next page load / refresh. Two improvements: (1) poll the job status (or subscribe via SSE/websocket if added later) and update the button to 'Running -> Done'; (2) auto-fetch /generated for this source_content_id after success and append the new tiles inline. Today users have to manually refresh or navigate away to the Generated tab.

title: Generated tab + Library tab discoverability — both bury results
description: Several smoke-test users were confused about where generated content lives. The Detail page does show it inline (below the body) and the left-sidebar 'Generated' tab is a flat list, but neither is signposted on the Detail page once a job is enqueued. Add: (a) on enqueue, scroll to/hint at the inline Generated Content section, (b) a subtle link/breadcrumb 'See all 3 generated for this source' that deep-links into the Generated tab filtered by source_content_id.

title: Observability + eval hookup (Langfuse or LangSmith)
description: Trace agent calls, log prompts/completions/latency. Eval suite partner can rerun after ingesting client content to show answers stayed good. Signal of seriousness during security review.

title: CI auto-build + deploy on main push
description: GitHub Actions: on push to main, gcloud builds submit cih-api + cih-worker, gcloud run deploy *-prod. Removes manual rebuild step. Subsumes bead 045.

title: Cloud: parity for natural-language discover (agents/query or equivalent)
close_reason: Cloud POST /api/agents/query + shared/query_agent; Dashboard uses discover in cloud; CI python-cloud

title: Land feat/resend-magic-link-email — merge PR, CI green
description: PR ~10: Resend magic link + Terraform IAM + recovery docs. Rebase if needed; merge to main after review.
close_reason: Merged PR #10 to main (Resend + Terraform + docs)

title: Cloud Run cih-api: mount Secret Manager CIH_CLOUD_RESEND_API_KEY as env + verify magic-link email
description: IAM secretAccessor already granted via Terraform when resend_secret_id set. Cloud Run must reference secret as env CIH_CLOUD_RESEND_API_KEY. Set production CIH_CLOUD_* (DB, secrets, CORS, ENVIRONMENT).
close_reason: Resend secret mounted on cih-api-prod; CIH_CLOUD_ENVIRONMENT=production set; magic-link verified end-to-end (delivery=email, no dev_token). PR #12.

title: Surface upload+ingest on Library (and/or Dashboard) instead of Settings
description: Today the only way to add source content is Settings -> 'Upload And Ingest'. This is the primary product action so it should be: (a) an 'Add content' / 'Upload' button on the Library page (top right), opening the same file picker / drop zone, and (b) optionally a primary CTA on the Dashboard when content count is low. Reuse the existing logic in src/views/Settings.tsx (uploadAndQueueIngest, api.uploadFile, jobs.create('ingest', ...)). Drag-drop anywhere on Library would be a nice further upgrade.

title: Connector breadth: Drive + Notion + Confluence + Slack
description: First-class connectors beyond local file watcher. Each: OAuth, scheduled pull, dedup against existing index. Partner needs to answer can-it-ingest-from-X with yes for top 4 enterprise sources.

title: Set CIH_CLOUD_MAGIC_LINK_APP_BASE_URL for one-click sign-in in magic-link emails
description: Magic-link emails currently include only the raw token (no clickable Sign-In button) because magic_link_app_base_url is unset on cih-api-prod. Decide on the target URL (Electron deep link with custom scheme, or hosted web build), then 'gcloud run services update cih-api-prod --update-env-vars=CIH_CLOUD_MAGIC_LINK_APP_BASE_URL=...'.
